reach_why: Extends known critiques of evaluation and oversight, but does not introduce a wholly unprecedented explanatory framework.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links awkward truths, novelty filtering, self-trust criteria, and pretraining confounds into one evaluative challenge.
falsifiable_why: Parts are testable via ablations and handoff criteria, but axiomatic opaque truths weaken direct empirical assessment.
explanation: It argues polished explanations cannot justify self-trust when novelty, awkward truths, and pretraining confounds remain unresolved.
